## Meeting Purpose

[Reconnect on Ataccama's LLM visibility needs.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Ataccama's organic web traffic has dropped \~25% in the last quarter, a decline that persists post-holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** Users are shifting research to LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT), where competitors like Informatica and Collibra have superior visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [**Need:** A solution to analyze LLM ranking and provide an action plan to improve positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [**Next Step:** A meeting next week with VP of Growth Marketing Sophie Rares to evaluate growthx.ai's end-to-end service, which includes strategy, content creation, and monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

## Topics

### Ataccama's Challenge: Declining Organic Traffic

  - [Organic web traffic has dropped \~25% in the last quarter, a decline that persists post-holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [This has caused a "crazy" drop in monthly active users.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** Users are shifting research to LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude), where competitors like Informatica and Collibra have superior visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [**Identified Gaps:**](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [Weaker backlinking than competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [No Reddit presence, a key data source for LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

### Ataccama's Current Tooling & Evaluation

  - [Ataccama uses **Scrunch** for basic LLM ranking analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [The current evaluation is for a tool to analyze LLM ranking and provide an action plan to improve positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [**Context:** George Samaras (Marketing Ops) is facilitating the intro; the primary decision-maker is Sophie Rares (VP of Growth Marketing).](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

### growthx.ai's Proposed Solution

  - [growthx.ai offers an end-to-end service combining agency partnership with a technology platform.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [**Core Service:** Strategy, monitoring, and content creation (5 articles/week, new or refreshed) to improve LLM visibility and drive high-intent traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**Deliverables:** A 6-month content roadmap and weekly/bi-weekly performance reports.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [**Positioning:** A "best of both worlds" model (agency + tech) that differentiates from a pure technology tool like Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Prepare for the meeting next week with Sophie Rares (VP of Growth Marketing) to present growthx.ai's end-to-end service.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [**George:** Facilitate the intro between Tyler and Sophie Rares.](https://fathom.video/share/X-4Z5Wqt29XRQVoFfNyZjjZfCENyURjY?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
